location: Random (~4%) drop from Cuckoo Knights patrolling Bellum Highway, the road running northeast from the East Raya Lucaria Gate toward Bellum Church.
tactics: Several Cuckoo Knights patrol on and beside the highway near East Raya Lucaria Gate; pull them one at a time rather than the whole group at once.
Rest at the grace and return repeatedly to reroll the drop chance — they hit hard with greatswords and halberds, so fight carefully while farming.
Its high Magic guard makes it especially good for pushing through Raya Lucaria Academy's sorcerer enemies and Rennala's fight.
lore: A metal greatshield painted with a watchful cuckoo, carried by the enchanted knights sworn to Raya Lucaria Academy and well-suited to hunting down sorcerers.

builds.name: Magic-resistant Strength tank
builds.why: Strong Magic damage negation on top of full physical block makes it a top pick against Liurnia's many caster enemies and magic-heavy bosses.
